_comment: Copy to baseline.config.json at your repo root. The runner auto-detects sensible defaults; override only what you need. project_type declares intent ('this WILL ship code') so build/test rules fire even before code exists.
_project_type: node | service | python | library | docs. 'service' auto-enables the OPS (operability) rules.
_makes_external_claims: set false for an internal tool with no competitive/novelty claims → skips the CLAIM-* rules
_profiles: extra rule profiles to enable beyond 'core'. 'service' auto-enables for project_type=service; add 'advanced' to opt into SBOM/code-scanning/mutation/symbol-integrity rules. e.g. ["advanced"]
_bootstrap_command: the clean-checkout Task-1 command for BUILD-05; must exit 0. Omit to skip.
_doc_globs: which docs CTX-05 (broken links) and CTX-10 (path-integrity) scan.
_freshness_globs: OPT-IN for CTX-06: docs that must carry a 'last_review_date' in frontmatter. Empty = rule skips. e.g. ["docs/architecture.md", "docs/onboarding.md"]
_doc_freshness_days: CTX-06 goes red when a freshness_globs doc's last_review_date is older than this.
_doc_lag_days: CTX-11 goes red when a doc's anchored source code (frontmatter 'sources: [glob]') was committed more than this many days after the doc.
_stamp_max_lag_commits: CTX-01 accepts a 'last-verified' stamp naming HEAD or an ancestor within this many commits as fresh; beyond it (or off-branch) it warns to reconcile.
_generated_globs: OPT-IN for CTX-08: generated files that must carry a 'DO NOT EDIT' marker. Empty = rule skips. e.g. ["**/*.gen.ts", "docs/api/**"]
_grounding_docs: OPT-IN for CTX-09: required grounding docs that must exist and be non-empty. Empty = rule skips. e.g. ["docs/architecture.md", "docs/tech-stack.md"]
